channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Israel carries out strike on Beirut suburbs, first near capital in weeks
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- 3 killed in Israeli strike on Beirut's southern suburbs
- Israeli strike south of Beirut kills woman and two children
- Israel launches deadly strike near Beirut, widening Lebanon offensive
- Israel strikes near Beirut, widening Lebanon offensive
- Israel Strikes Beirut, Expanding Offensive in Lebanon
- Strikes kill family of 6 after Israel declares south Lebanon ‘combat zone’
- Israel Strikes Beirut, Expanding Offensive in Lebanon
- Israel attacks Beirut in new wave of bombing
- Israeli fighter jets struck a southern suburb of Beirut Thursday but it was not clear what the target was
- Israel intensifies attacks on southern Lebanon, killing at least 16 people
- Israeli strikes kill at least 14 across southern Lebanon ahead of Washington talks
- Israel hits Lebanese capital in 'targeted strike'
- Israel strikes southern Beirut amid increasing escalation in southern Lebanon
- Israeli strike near Beirut as Lebanon says raids kill 14
- Israeli military delivers precision strike on Beirut
- Israel carries out strike on Beirut suburbs, first near Lebanese capital in weeks
- 16 dead as Israel steps up attacks in Southern Lebanon
- Israeli strikes kill at least 8 in Lebanon’s fourth largest city ahead of Washington talks
- Israel carries out strikes on Lebanon's southern city of Tyre
- Israeli strikes kill at least 14 across southern Lebanon ahead of Washington talks
- Israeli military launches strike on Beirut

- Hezbollah launches attacks on invading Israeli army, Israeli strike kills three
- Israeli bombardment of southern Lebanon continues
- Israel intensifies attacks on southern Lebanon, killing at least 16 people

- Urgent: Israeli strike targets residential building in Beirut's southern suburbs -- media
- Flash: Israel attacks Beirut's southern suburbs after weeks of halt -- eyewitnesses
- Israel attacks Beirut in new wave of bombing
- Israeli air strikes reported across south Lebanon]]>

- US strikes Iran targets for second time in three days
- U.S. military launches fresh strikes in Iran
- US carries out fresh strikes on Iran
- U.S. Strikes Military Sites in Iran for Second Time in 3 Days
